module.description: Canonical owner of framework workspace surfaces.

module_designer.title: Module Designer
module_designer.description: Preview and generate framework modules through the canonical scaffolding engine.

navigation.label: Module Designer
navigation.hint: Preview and generate guarded module scaffolds.

blueprint.title: Module blueprint
blueprint.description: Validate the destination and inspect every generated file before writing.

preview.title: Verified preview
preview.description: This preview is signed and expires after ten minutes.

messages.preview_failed: The scaffold preview could not be generated.
messages.generation_failed: The module could not be generated. No internal exception details were exposed.

validation.module_name: Use one PascalCase namespace segment without separators.
validation.permission_slug: Use lowercase kebab-case for the permission slug.
validation.permission_surface: Public and unguarded surfaces cannot declare a permission.
validation.list_value: Use lowercase identifiers separated by commas or new lines.
validation.destination: The generated destination is outside the allowed repository space.
validation.destination_exists: The target module directory already exists.
validation.preview_required: Generate requires a current, untampered preview.

localization.title: Locale Tools
localization.description: Inspect coverage and safely initialize or synchronize locale catalogs.

navigation.label: Locale Tools
navigation.hint: Manage runtime locale policy and catalog coverage.

localization.dry_run: Preview only; do not write files

messages.settings_failed: The runtime locale policy could not be updated.
messages.preview_ready: Dry-run completed. No files were changed.
messages.create_failed: The locale could not be initialized. Partial writes were rolled back.
messages.sync_failed: The locale could not be synchronized. Partial writes were rolled back.

validation.locale_code: Use a locale code such as es, fr or pt-br.
validation.base_locale: The English base locale cannot be mutated.
validation.labels_json: Locale labels must be a valid JSON object.
validation.labels_complete: Every supported locale requires a non-empty label.

module_designer.description: Design workspace modules and their declared surfaces.

media_fields.description: Manage workspace media metadata field definitions.
